data_description.api_key: Log in to https://account.quic.nz/, select a service, scroll to the bottom and copy your API key (click 'Roll API Key' if the field is empty).

service.title: Select Service
service.description: Multiple services were found for this API key. Choose which one to monitor.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Quic Broadband
reauth_confirm.description: Your Quic API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new one.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Quic API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
error.no_services: No services were found for this API key.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. See the Home Assistant logs for details.
